page_content:
Restriction: Senior standing.

Credit Only Granted for. ENME476 or ENME489F.

Formerly: ENME489F.

ENME477 Microelectromechanical Systems (MEMS) II (3 Credits) Fabrication of devices designed in MEMS I, including everything from mask printing through training on state-of-the-art fabrication equipment through device testing. In-depth understanding of MEMS devices and technologies, such as mechanical and electromagnetic transducers, microfluidics, and chemical sensors.
